title: urm move
text: urm move Move files from a source to target directory or zip file. urm { Switches } move Source {+ Source }{ Destination } { Options } Switches and Parameters See urm . Options Option Description -silent Move files silently, without displaying messages. -noSubDir Do not process subdirectories -after= yyyymmdd { hhnnss } | today -before= yyyymmdd { hhnnss } | today Specify date of files. The following separators are allowed: - (hyphen), / (slash), and : (colon). Note: The date format differs from the date format in the /aft and /bef switches. Example: Moving Objects The following command moves the specified files in a directory, ignoring any subdirectories urm move C:/Dir/FIL*.fil C:/NewDir/FIL*.fil -nosubdir Copy Was this topic helpful?
